evidence.summary: Robert: From now on, when we make HTML or tracker tools, the system should automatically use the visual presentation gate and browser render resolver. It should stay sandbox-first because I am usually on Android and /mnt/data, and PC tools should only be an addendum. When browser screenshot fails, record the method reliability and use WeasyPrint proxy honestly. Build a router, ledger, fixture, and receipt so I do not have to explain this again.

baseline_comparison.current_behavior: Use current OS routing, gates, resolvers, ledgers, fixtures, and sandbox-first defaults.
baseline_comparison.proposed_behavior: Adopt transcript-derived workflow lesson only if it improves current behavior and can be artifactized.
